reviews.comment:
Buena atención, descuentos para socios del ACA, tiene al costado de la estación un lugar con bancos para descansar y parrillas, muy lindo lugar para tomarse un descanso y seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
Good service, discounts for ACA members, next to the station there's a place with benches to rest and grills, a very nice place to take a break and continue your journey

reviews.comment:
La estación es muy linda y los baños muchos e impecables pero las medialunas horribles, del año pasado más o menos y tuvimos que hacer 2 cola que nos llevaron 20 minutos por un café. Paramos ahí porque decía que servían leche de almendras y cómo yo no puedo lacteos esperamos a llegar a una YPF...por supuesto no había

(Translated by Google)
The station is very nice and the bathrooms are plentiful and spotless, but the croissants were awful, more or less from last year, and we had to wait in two lines that took 20 minutes just for a coffee. We stopped there because it said they served almond milk, and since I can't have dairy, we waited until we got to a YPF gas station... of course, they didn't have any.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoaTVYLWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Paré unos minutos a descansar, pedí para limpiar el vidrio y me dicen “lo estoy usando” de muy mala manera, pregunto a los otros y “no tienen”, me mandan con el que lo está usando, ¿me van a decir que tienen uno solo en toda la estación? Pésimo servicio.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for a few minutes to rest, asked to have the windshield cleaned, and they rudely told me, "I'm using it." I asked the others, and they said, "We don't have one." They sent me to the one who was using it. Are they going to tell me they only have one in the whole station? Terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNDV2Qnl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
ACA dejo de ser lo que fue. Las instalaciones viejas, descuidadas, los baños un asco. El olor nauseabundo invade  el triste local. Una pena.
La atención de los empleados en muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
ACA is no longer what it used to be. The facilities are old and neglected, the bathrooms are disgusting. A nauseating smell pervades the sad place. It's a shame.

The staff's service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobzliUWxnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The halfway point. I get there and I know I'm only halfway there.
